name: King Malcus
learned: King Malcus is the enigmatic ruler of the Hidden Kingdom, a man shaped by years of ruling in secrecy. He has a deep understanding of the kingdom's history, politics, and the advanced technologies that sustain it.
currently: King Malcus is focused on maintaining control of the kingdom and ensuring the survival of his reign. He is aware of Lara’s return and sees her as both a threat and a potential ally in securing his position.
lifestyle: King Malcus maintains a strict daily routine centered around governance and strategy. He spends his mornings in council meetings, his afternoons in private discussions with advisors and nobles, and his evenings overseeing the kingdom’s security. His life is largely solitary, focused on maintaining the status quo.
